delete_protection.description: Enables protection against accidental resource deletion

description.description: Provides a human-readable description for the resource

encryption_configuration.description: Defines encryption settings, including type and optional key ID

firewall_policy_arn.description: Specifies the ARN for the associated firewall policy

firewall_policy_change_protection.description: Prevents changes to the firewall policy configuration

name.description: Specifies the unique name for the resource

subnet_change_protection.description: Prevents modifications to the subnet mapping

subnet_mapping.description: Defines subnet associations, including optional IP address type

tags.description: Defines key-value pairs for tagging and resource management

timeouts.description: Specifies custom timeouts for create, update, and delete operations

vpc_id.description: Identifies the VPC where the resource is deployed
